MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-21-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT KENNETH LEE'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSE TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED IN PART, DENIED IN PART: A. IF PLAINTIFF'S PREVIOUS RESPONSES HAVE NOT BEEN VERIFIED, PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHIN FIVE DAYS OF THE DATE OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER; B. BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION THAT COPIES OF DOCUMENTS HAVE BEEN PRODUCED FOR INSPECTION, THE REMAINDER OF THE MOTION IS ORDERED OFF-CALENDAR AS MOOT; C. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Off Calendar

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-08-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Ntc And Mtn For Order Compelling Response To Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents
Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kenneth Lee, for Defendant and moving party, in Propria Persona

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Kenneth Lee's Motion For Order Compelling Response To Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents is granted in part, denied in part:
a. If plaintiff's previous responses have not been verified, plaintiff shall serve verified responses within five days of the date of service of this order;
b. Based on plaintiff's declaration that copies of documents have been produced for inspection, the remainder of the motion is ordered off-calendar as moot;
c. Request for sanctions denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Continued To Jul-14-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Off Calendar Dec-01-2008 Arbitrator Assigned Directly
